cohort_dimensions.label: Operational load
cohort_dimensions.blurb: Composite of workload index, 14-day overtime and consecutive shifts worked, the operational levers Welo can act on with rostering.

cohort_dimensions.label: Fatigue / burnout band
cohort_dimensions.blurb: Composite fatigue & burnout score band, the single strongest driver in the model.

cohort_dimensions.label: Age band
cohort_dimensions.blurb: Age cohort. Metabolic and chronic-disease risk rises with age.

cohort_dimensions.label: Tenure band
cohort_dimensions.blurb: Time in service: onboarding strain vs. long-service chronic load.

cohort_dimensions.label: Lifestyle risk
cohort_dimensions.blurb: Smoking and alcohol load; together the top SHAP driver of predicted absence.
